arts.ttl: Can Arsenal beat PSG in Champions League, or will they still be a "Nearly Team?"
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta needs to find a way to ensure his Arsenal side avoid being known as football's "Nearly Team." Winning the Champions League would certainly do that.
